svg.text: Standard security patterns for Supabase Row Level Security

g.text: User can only access rows where user_id = their ID
-- Policy: users can only SELECT own rows
Backend service can bypass user restrictions
Deny DELETE, use status flag instead

a.text: Service role operations complete for all backend use cases
Security review completed before production deployment
Zero audit log tampering in testing
Zero user enumeration by anonymous users

g.text: Compliance: GDPR (Data Protection) + SOC 2 (Security Audit) | Scale: 1K-10K users
